target:configuration-properties.target:property: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMMSPAYMENT" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBETAXPAYMENT" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/ToGetAccountInfo/Input" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns39:ToGetAccountInfo> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType> <enquiryInputCollection> <columnName> <xsl:value-of select="'@ID'"></xsl:value-of> </columnName> <criteriaValue> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/checkAccount/AccountNo"></xsl:value-of> </criteriaValue> <operand> <xsl:value-of select="'EQ'"></xsl:value-of> </operand> </enquiryInputCollection> </CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType> </ns39:ToGetAccountInfo> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/ToGetAccountInfo/Output" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns40="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMMSPAYMENT" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBETAXPAYMENT" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <checkAccountRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(count($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType))<=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="'124'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:STATUSCODE"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:STATUDESC"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <AccountCcy> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTCCY"></xsl:value-of> </AccountCcy> <AccountBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalance> <AccountBalanceAvaliable> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTAVLBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalanceAvaliable> <AccountBranchOpen> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTBRANCH"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBranchOpen> <AccountName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:SHORTTITLE"></xsl:value-of> </AccountName> <CustomerID> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:CUSTOMER"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerID> <Phonenumber> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:PHNO),string(' '),string('g'),string(''))"></xsl:value-of> </Phonenumber> </checkAccountRp> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMMSPAYMENT" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBETAXPAYMENT" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/MobileBillRefund/Input" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns39:MobileBillRefund> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <activityName> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </activityName> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUNDType> <transactionId> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/reversal/transRefNo"></xsl:value-of> </transactionId> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUNDType> </ns39:MobileBillRefund> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <fundtransfer> <Amount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </Amount> <TxnFee> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/TxnFee"></xsl:value-of> </TxnFee> <FromAccount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </FromAccount> <ToAccount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ToAccount> <Remark> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/Remark"></xsl:value-of> </Remark> <TransId> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/TransId"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ESBX__SYSTEM__USER_DEFINED_DOC_ID', $document_Input1/fundtransfer/TransId)"></xsl:value-of> </TransId> <CurrenCy> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/CurrenCy"></xsl:value-of> </CurrenCy> <TxnType> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/TxnType"></xsl:value-of> </TxnType> <debitcurrency> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/debitcurrency"></xsl:value-of> </debitcurrency> <merchantID> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantID"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantID)=('900010000020001')"> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidateMerchantID', '00000GDT')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="($document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantID)=('900010000020002')"> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidateMerchantID', '00000EDC')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidateMerchantID', '00000MMS')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </merchantID> <merchantName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantName"></xsl:value-of> </merchantName> </fundtransfer> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns40="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMMSPAYMENT" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBETAXPAYMENT" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/MobileBillRefund/Output" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <TxnCommitRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:MobileBillRefundResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns35:STATUSCODE"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:MobileBillRefundResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns35:STATUDESC"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <TxnCommitTime> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:MobileBillRefundResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns35:gDATETIME/ns35:DATETIME"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCommitTime> </TxnCommitRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTREV" xmlns:ns14="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTAPIREV" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FtInterfaceWar3" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFASTIN" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCM" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTCANCEL" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTAPI" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTREMITTANCECONFIRM" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/FtInterfaceWar3/BakongIncomingTransaction/Output" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <TxnCommitRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns13:BakongIncomingTransactionResponse/Status/successIndicator)=('Success')"> <xsl:value-of select="'00'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'902'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns13:BakongIncomingTransactionResponse/Status/successIndicator"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <TransRefNo> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns13:BakongIncomingTransactionResponse/Status/transactionId"></xsl:value-of> </TransRefNo> <TxnCommitTime> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns13:BakongIncomingTransactionResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns12:gDATETIME/ns12:DATETIME"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCommitTime> <AccountBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns13:BakongIncomingTransactionResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns12:FTAVLBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalance> </TxnCommitRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPI" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/CPTWS/WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI/Input" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACRTMB" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/CPTWS" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSWIFTOUTMB" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <assignReason> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </assignReason> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPIType> <ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Channel)=('MOBAPP')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_Input1/FTCollectRq/FromAccount),string('1403300010001'),string('g'),string('1403800010001'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <ns7:DEBITTHEIRREF> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Remark"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITTHEIRREF> <ns7:CREDITTHEIRREF> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Remark"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITTHEIRREF> <ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <ns7:CREDITCURRENCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Currency"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITCURRENCY> <ns7:CREDITAMOUNT> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITAMOUNT> <ns7:gPAYMENTDETAILS> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:PAYMENTDETAILS> <xsl:value-of select="'COLLECTION'"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:PAYMENTDETAILS> </ns7:gPAYMENTDETAILS> <ns7:gCOMMISSIONTYPE> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:mCOMMISSIONTYPE> <xsl:attribute name="m"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute></ns7:mCOMMISSIONTYPE> </ns7:gCOMMISSIONTYPE> <ns7:INITBANK> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTCollectRq/TransId"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:INITBANK> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPIType> </ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPI" xmlns:ns11="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/CPTWS/WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPI/Output" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACRTMB" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/CPTWS" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSWIFTOUTMB" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <FTCollectRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPIResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns8:STATUSCODE"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPIResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns8:STATUDESC"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <TransRefNo> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPIResponse/Status/transactionId"></xsl:value-of> </TransRefNo> <TxnCommitTime> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns10:WSCPBTWSCPBWINGAPIResponse/FUNDSTRANSFERType/ns8:gDATETIME/ns8:DATETIME"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCommitTime> </FTCollectRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTREMITTANCECONFIRM" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFASTIN" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTCANCEL" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/FtInterfaceWar3/BakongIncomingTransaction/Input" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTREV" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FtInterfaceWar3" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTAPI" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCM" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTAPIREV" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns13:BakongIncomingTransaction> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <activityName> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </activityName> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCMType> <ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(($document_Input1/khqrin/Amount)>=('50000') and ($document_Input1/khqrin/CurrenCy)=('USD'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'USD1700700030001'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(($document_Input1/khqrin/Amount)>=('200000000') and ($document_Input1/khqrin/CurrenCy)=('KHR'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'KHR1700700030001'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <ns7:DEBITCURRENCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/CurrenCy"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITCURRENCY> <ns7:DEBITAMOUNT> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITAMOUNT> <ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <ns7:gCPBFTRCVANS> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:CPBFTRCVANS> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CPBFTRCVANS> </ns7:gCPBFTRCVANS> <ns7:INITBANK> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/TransId"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:INITBANK> <ns7:DBRTNAME> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_Input1/khqrin/frombank,'0','35')"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DBRTNAME> <ns7:RECIEVEBANK> <xsl:value-of select="'CPBPKHPPXXX'"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:RECIEVEBANK> <ns7:CDRTNAME> <xsl:value-of select="normalize-space($document_Input1/khqrin/CreditName)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CDRTNAME> <ns7:gCPBFTREMARK> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:CPBFTREMARK> <xsl:value-of select="concat('KHQR_',$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CPBFTREMARK> </ns7:gCPBFTREMARK> <ns7:FASTPAYID> <xsl:value-of select="concat('KHQR_',$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:FASTPAYID> <ns7:FASTMSGID> <xsl:value-of select="concat('KHQR_',$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:FASTMSGID> <ns7:gLTXNNARRDR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:LTXNNARRDR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_Input1/khqrin/Remark,'0','60')"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:LTXNNARRDR> </ns7:gLTXNNARRDR> <ns7:gLTXNNARRCR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:LTXNNARRCR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_Input1/khqrin/Remark,'0','60')"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:LTXNNARRCR> </ns7:gLTXNNARRCR> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCMType> </ns13:BakongIncomingTransaction> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:DTB="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:EncrPassword="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:LAUUtil="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:RemoveEmojis="RemoveEmojis" xmlns:SafaricomTokenGenerator="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:nestedjson="nestedjson" xmlns:padding="padding" xmlns:ss="ss" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:test_2="test_2" xmlns:testvensys="testvensys" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math DTB EnDe EncrPassword LAUUtil MD5Hex Md5UniCode RemoveEmojis SafaricomTokenGenerator StringLength dateConversion myext nestedjson padding ss strings test_2 testvensys truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="text" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <khqrin> <Amount><xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request,'&')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request),string('&'),string('g'),string('&amp;'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="if1"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($if0,'amp;amp;')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($if0),string('amp;amp;'),string('g'),string('amp;'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if1"></xsl:value-of><!-- <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request,'&')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string(null),string('&'),string('g'),string('&amp;'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of>--></Amount> </khqrin> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>
